description_long: This is a rectangular box of Quaker Simply Granola, featuring a prominent image of a bowl filled with granola, oats, honey, and almonds on the front. The packaging is primarily white with warm brown and gold accents, and displays the Quaker brand logo at the top. The back of the box highlights the product's ingredients with illustrations of oats, honey, and almonds, and includes a spoonful of granola as a central visual. One side panel lists nutritional facts in detail, while the other side promotes other flavors and features social media icons. The box is made of cardboard and is designed to be easily opened from the top, typical for breakfast cereal or snack packaging.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Quaker Simply Granola, featuring a bowl of granola with oats, honey, and almonds, and detailed branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Quaker Simply Granola branding, a large image of a granola bowl, and key product highlights such as fiber content and flavor.
description_view_1: The left side panel displays additional flavors, social media icons, and vertical branding, with less visual emphasis on product imagery.
description_view_2: The back view features a spoonful of granola, ingredient illustrations (oats, honey, almonds), and descriptive product text.
description_view_3: The right side panel contains the nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and barcode, with minimal branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The Quaker logo is visible on the front, top, and side panels; it features a blue and white illustration of a man in a hat, with the word 'QUAKER' in bold blue letters beneath.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box states 'Oats, Honey & Almonds' and shows images of granola, honey, and almonds.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the right side panel, listing calories, fat, carbohydrates, and other nutrients.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front panel features a mascot (the Quaker man) and a 'NEW LOOK' badge in the top left corner.
